data.title: Tetra Tech Lands US Army Deal To Modernize Middle East Military Infrastructure
data.description: Tetra Tech secures contract from US Army Corps of Engineers for A-E design services in the Middle East, highlighting their role in infrastructure and defense.

data.title: Bitcoin Vs. LUNR: Intuitive Machines May Outpace BTC In Volatility; EPA Targets Biden-Era Rules; Musk Sees Tesla Doubling Output – Top Headlines While The US Slept
White House Withdraws CDC Director Nominee Dave Weldon
data.description: The White House withdrew Dr. Dave Weldon's nomination as CDC director just before his Senate hearing. His vaccine safety views and past criticisms of the agency raised concerns.

data.title: GM And PG&E Team Up To Let EVs Power Homes, Offer Up To $4,500 In Energy Incentives
data.description: GM joins PG&E's Vehicle-to-Everything pilot program, offering incentives for bidirectional charging tech. 2025 EVs to be added soon. Strong Q4 sales.

data.title: Village Farms CEO Highlights Momentum For Profitable Expansion, Clocks 11% Jump In Q4 Sales
data.description: Village Farms reported Q4 revenue of $82.55 million, beating estimates, but posted a loss of 8 cents per share. Canadian Cannabis sales rose 10% as expansion plans continue.
